race.description: Joseph Jones Racing CB Showcase B58 Handicap
race.comment: STRAIGHT FIRE (1) gave her all with the 60.5kg at the second run back with a tenacious third over 1400m at Wagga. Gets a similar set-up for this and will relish the mile. Hard to run down. COLORADO SUN (8) steps out to the mile for the first time after catching the eye from near last on the turn with a tidy fourth over 1400m at Nowra. Can handle the rise in grade from the awkward draw. Each way. NEVER LOSE FAITH (12) best form is over the mile and looks well in with the 3kg claim. Dropped in grade with a fighting neck win over 1600m at Braidwood. Maps well and can take a hand in the finish. TURN LEFT (9) this looks a target race third-up after sitting on the speed for an improved fourth over 1460m at Queanbeyan. Can get the trip and has a key jockey change. STAR BLING (3) strips fitter after she faded late when last in tougher company over this trip at Canberra. One for the exotics.
